paper_focus.title: Strengthening mechanisms in Fe-Al based ferritic low-density steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the strengthening mechanisms in binary Fe-Al based ferritic low-density steels, particularly Fe-6.8Al, through quantitative microstructural analysis and modeling.
material_systems: Fe-Al binary alloys with Al contents of 5, 6, 6.8, 9 wt%
main_process_variables: vacuum arc melting and repeated remelting
